Britain’s King Charles will have tea and a private meeting with ⁠President Donald Trump during his US state visit later this month, as the UK government hopes his “soft power” can heal a damaging rift between the allies caused by the Iran war.

news.summary:

news.headline: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
news.summary: The killings mark the fourth US deadly strike in the past four days on vessels in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

news.headline: China, Spain call for closer ties amid  ‘crumbling’ world order
news.summary:
<p>BEIJING: Europe and China must forge closer ties to counter threats to multilateralism, Spanish Premier Pedro Sanchez said on Tuesday after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping, who said the international order is “crumbling”.</p>
